subcodes.title: The Duty of Kindness and Sympathy towards Strangers and Foreigners:  Words spoken on 1911-10-16 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: When a man turns his face to God he finds sunshine everywhere. All men are his brothers…. Do not be content with showing friendship in words alone...
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @words vs deeds
